title: Add AI Package to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AI Package](https://cyclonelib.pages.dev/) to build
- Mentions Apple Shortcuts.

Fixes #9947

gist.headline: Shortcuts to the hive
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the greenhouse. 'AI Package' brings Pollinations directly to your Apple Shortcuts.
gist.summary: Added 'AI Package' to the community showcase, integrating Pollinations AI capabilities with Apple Shortcuts.
gist.impact: Users can now explore how to trigger AI image and text generation directly from their iOS devices using Apple Shortcuts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a retro smartphone or Apple Shortcuts-style icon in a cozy digital greenhouse, representing iOS automation meeting the Pollinations ecosystem.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot holding a tiny glowing smartphone showing an automation icon. She is hovering in a lush digital greenhouse with code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
